subcodes.first_line: O Ali! We have indeed heard thy call and have become apprised of what lieth within thy heart of the love of God, thy Lord and the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد سمعنا ندائک و اطلعنا بما فی قلبک من حب الله ربک و رب العالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action
